entries.mem0ai/mem0: A universal memory layer and official Hermes Agent provider available as a managed cloud or self-hosted OSS. It features multi-level state management for users and sessions using hybrid retrieval and time-aware matching.
entries.supermemoryai/supermemory: An official Hermes Agent memory engine featuring a custom vector graph engine with sub-300ms recall. It manages persistent user profiles and handles temporal changes and contradictions with native connectors for Notion, GitHub, and Google Drive.
entries.volcengine/OpenViking: An official Hermes Agent context database that uses a tiered L0/L1/L2 loading system and viking:// URIs. It significantly reduces token usage and improves task completion through filesystem-based organization and visualized retrieval trajectories.
entries.garrytan/gbrain: An opinionated brain for Hermes Agent that synthesizes cited answers with explicit gap analysis. It utilizes a self-wiring knowledge graph with typed edges to provide scoped institutional memory for teams.
entries.vectorize-io/hindsight: A learning-focused memory system that implements retain, recall, and reflect workflows for long-term knowledge. It integrates as an LLM wrapper supporting providers like OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and Ollama.
entries.plastic-labs/honcho: A reasoning-first memory library that extracts conclusions from events and conversations. It uses peer-centric modeling and hybrid BM25/vector search to build stateful agents.
entries.campfirein/byterover-cli: An official Hermes Agent provider that treats memory as a git repository, using branches and commits for context management. It offers 5-tier retrieval with sub-100ms latency and an interactive REPL with 24 built-in tools.
entries.greyhaven-ai/autocontext: A recursive self-improving context harness that generates persistent playbooks and artifacts to help agents solve complex tasks. It integrates via MCP and CLI and supports both local Pi runtimes and major LLM APIs.
entries.AxDSan/mnemosyne: A zero-dependency memory system utilizing SQLite for sub-millisecond retrieval latency. It features a temporal knowledge graph and episodic compression, with native MCP support for Claude Code and Cursor.
entries.stephenschoettler/hermes-lcm: A lossless context management plugin that uses a hierarchical summary DAG for depth-aware compaction. It preserves raw message lineage in SQLite and provides tools for grepping and expanding compacted context.
entries.elkimek/honcho-self-hosted: A self-hosted backend for the Honcho library that enables private cross-session persistence for Hermes Agent. It supports local inference servers and OpenAI-compatible providers via a Docker, PostgreSQL, and Redis setup.
entries.plur-ai/plur: A shared memory layer for multi-agent systems using an open YAML engram format to eliminate API costs. It employs ACT-R activation to strengthen relevant facts and decay stale information.
entries.Signet-AI/signetai: A local-first identity and secrets layer that provides portable state across Hermes Agent, Claude Code, and MCP clients. It uses SQLite storage and includes a repairable system for editing or reclassifying agent context.
entries.yoloshii/ClawMem: An on-device context engine that operates entirely locally without cloud dependencies or API keys. It combines BM25, vector search, and knowledge graphs via MCP server and agent plugins.
entries.EfficientContext/ContextPilot: A context optimization tool that increases prefill speed by 1.5–3× through prefix cache reuse. It reduces prompt token usage by roughly 36% and provides native plugins for Hermes Agent and OpenClaw.
entries.yantrikos/yantrikdb-hermes-plugin: An embedded, self-maintaining memory plugin that provides explainable recall via why_retrieved tags. It tracks contradictions and canonicalizes duplicates without requiring a separate server or GPU.
entries.yepyhun/Brainstack: A memory kernel stack that consolidates temporal continuity, graph truth, and corpus retrieval. It leverages a multi-layered storage approach using SQLite, Kuzu, and Chroma to reduce prompt noise.
entries.keepnotes-ai/keep: A reflective memory system combining BM25 full-text search with ranked graph traversal. It automatically indexes local directories, URLs, and multimedia files using edge tags for navigable relationships.
entries.amanning3390/flowstate-qmd: An anticipatory memory system that prefetches context by monitoring agent session logs. It uses local-first storage with SQLite-vec and GGUF models via an MCP-native server.
entries.alias8818/hermes-tool-slimmer: A utility that reduces prompt token overhead by using local BM25 ranking for tool selection. It includes a dashboard to track schema token savings and is compatible with Hermes Agent v0.14.0.
entries.Ladybug-Memory/hermes-memory-plugin: A local-only plugin using a columnar .lbdb embedded graph database with importance-weighted recall. It prioritizes high-priority memories during prefetch and supports GLiNER2 entity extraction.
entries.MukundaKatta/hermes-agentmemory: A pull-model episodic memory plugin that ensures real deletion of data to prevent persistent summaries from haunting recall. It includes a trace.jsonl audit log for monitoring every memory operation.
entries.futurebrowser/hermes-exabase-plugin: A plugin that integrates Exabase M-1 for self-organizing long-term memory. It provides tools for manual storage and searching, alongside configurable query expansion and result reranking.

entries.nexu-io/open-design: A local-first design and prototyping system that generates prototypes, motion graphics, and images. It integrates with Hermes Agent and other local CLIs to bridge the gap between design and code.
entries.mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills: A comprehensive library of 754 cybersecurity skills mapped to major frameworks like MITRE ATT&CK and NIST CSF 2.0. It follows the agentskills.io standard for seamless discovery across AI platforms.
entries.Agents365-ai/drawio-skill: Enables the generation of draw.io diagrams, including ERDs and Flowcharts, from natural language. It can visualize codebase structures for languages like Python, Go, and Rust using thousands of official shapes.
entries.AMAP-ML/SkillClaw: An agentic evolver that automates skill deduplication and quality improvement through background evolution loops. It unifies skill libraries across multiple agents and devices with native Hermes integration.
entries.conorbronsdon/avoid-ai-writing: An auditing tool that detects and rewrites content to eliminate AI writing patterns. It utilizes a two-pass detection system and 49 pattern categories to ensure human-like output.
entries.wondelai/skills: A cross-platform skills library based on industry guidelines and established frameworks. It offers modular installation via npx or a plugin marketplace for agentskills.io-compatible agents.
entries.Romanescu11/hermes-skill-factory: A meta-skill plugin that monitors active workflows to automatically propose and generate reusable skills. It produces both Python plugin scaffolds and SKILL.md documentation.
entries.DougTrajano/pydantic-ai-skills: Provides type-safe agentskills.io support for Pydantic AI. It uses progressive disclosure of metadata to reduce token usage and supports both programmatic and filesystem-based definitions.
entries.ZeroPointRepo/youtube-skills: A set of tools for extracting YouTube transcripts, captions, and timestamps without relying on yt-dlp. It supports video search and playlist extraction for Hermes Agent and other compatible agents.
entries.amanning3390/hermeshub: A community hub for browsing and installing skills with automated security scanning and threat detection. It features a creator marketplace with crypto/Stripe payments and an agent-to-agent trust scoring system.
entries.Cranot/super-hermes: Teaches Hermes Agent to generate its own analytical prompts using dynamic 'prisms' for resilience and optimization. It includes constraint reporting to identify analysis blind spots via /prism-reflect.
entries.AkoliteZA/hermes-agent-idea-workflow: A workflow that converts rough ideas into structured design documents and implementation handoffs. It offers Lite and Full modes and includes a PASS/FAIL evaluation gate for spec reviews.
entries.ReinaMacCredy/maestro: A local-first Rust harness for long-running agents featuring structured memory and a plan-approve-execute cycle. It uses a durable card model to track tasks and evidence-backed QA gates for verification.
entries.tlehman/litprog-skill: A literate programming tool that weaves code and documentation into .lit.md files. It uses a tangler to extract runnable source files and automatically syncs edits back to the documentation.
entries.esaradev/icarus-plugin: Implements cross-instance shared memory via markdown files to capture high-value decisions. It includes a pipeline for fine-tuning and switching to replacement models based on captured work.
entries.smartcontractkit/chainlink-agent-skills: Provides agentskills.io-compliant tools for interacting with the Chainlink oracle network. It supports integrations for CCIP, VRF, and Data Feeds, installable via the Vercel skills CLI.
entries.armelhbobdad/bmad-module-skill-forge: Converts repositories, documentation, and developer discourse into compliant agentskills.io skills. It ensures provenance through pinned commits and file-line citations.
entries.black-forest-labs/skills: Official FLUX image generation skills providing standardized prompting guidelines for FLUX.1 and FLUX.2. It includes API integration patterns for webhooks and precise hex color specifications.
entries.chigwell/skilldock.io: A registry of reusable AI skills featuring a versioned installation system with recursive dependency resolution. It provides an OpenAPI-driven Python client and supports Stripe and TON payment rails.
entries.tiann/execplan-skill: Enables autonomous execution of complex, multi-step tasks with real-time progress tracking. It includes built-in rollback procedures to ensure safe recovery during long-running operations.
entries.cablate/Agentic-MCP-Skill: A progressive MCP client that uses three-layer lazy loading to minimize token consumption. It utilizes a socket-based daemon architecture to support hot-reloading of server configurations.
entries.adnw-vinc/hermes-nextcloud: Integrates Hermes Agent with Nextcloud to manage files, calendars, and contacts via WebDAV and CalDAV. It ensures secure communication using HTTPS and Nextcloud App Passwords.
entries.PederHP/skillsdotnet: A C#/.NET implementation of the agentskills.io specification with MCP integration. It leverages Microsoft.Extensions.AI for tool-based loading and supports automatic directory registration.
entries.Sahil-SS9/hermes-multichannel-prompt-opt: A plugin that rewrites and scores prompts across various surfaces like Discord and Telegram. It tailors outputs based on model reasoning capabilities and tracks token savings in a local SQLite database.
entries.Sahil-SS9/hermaguard: An adversarial code review tool that uses three parallel subagents to hunt for bugs and exploitability. It integrates Semgrep and Bandit for pre-scanning and uses an MCP server to manage suppression rules.
entries.Sahil-SS9/hermes-simplify-swarm: A multi-agent swarm that simplifies code by targeting hygiene, clarity, and correctness. It uses a risk-tiered triage system to safely modify code and detect concurrency anti-patterns.
entries.willingning-coder/eagle-eye: A five-layer retrieval system that uses FTS5, embeddings, and RRF fusion to find the most relevant skills. It reduces token consumption by filtering large skill libraries down to the top five matches.
entries.mag3nt-com/openclaw-skill: Automates payments for HTTP 402 responses using USDC via protocols like Pay Link and x402. It is compatible with Hermes Agent, OpenClaw, and the agentskills.io standard.

entries.numtide/llm-agents.nix: A collection of Nix packages that enables instant execution of Hermes and other AI coding agents via nix run commands. It ensures the latest versions are always available through daily automatic updates.
entries.marshallrichards/ClawPhone: A set of scripts and guides designed to run agent CLIs on Android smartphones using Termux. It provides an automated installer for ARM64 devices and enables hardware and UI access via Termux:API and Termux:GUI.
entries.rookiemann/portable-hermes-agent: A zero-install Windows desktop agent featuring a GUI and 100 built-in tools across 20 toolsets. It supports local models via LM Studio and includes a dynamic tool maker for custom automation pipelines.
entries.AbuZar-Ansarii/Hermes-Agent-On-Android: A Termux-based deployment guide featuring a one-line installation script for rapid Android setup. It supports over 70 integrated tools and is compatible with 200+ AI models, including local Ollama instances.
entries.ultraworkers/hermes-agent-helm-chart: An unofficial Helm chart for Kubernetes deployments that implements cloud-native state-safety guardrails. It enforces single-writer safety for persistent storage and supports both direct deployment and operator-ready CRD workflows.
entries.TheAiSingularity/hermesclaw: A security-focused implementation that sandboxes the agent with hardware-enforced kernel-level blocking of dangerous syscalls and network egress. It offers dynamic security policies and integrates with IDEs and MCP servers.
entries.xmbshwll/hermes-agent-docker: A streamlined Docker sandbox image that bundles the official Hermes installation with mini-swe-agent. It allows for persistent state through mounted home directories and supports custom tag builds via build arguments.
entries.0xrsydn/nix-hermes-agent: A NixOS module and package that provides declarative management of agent configurations and systemd services. It integrates sops-nix for secure secrets handling and supports a hybrid of Nix-managed and interactive CLI skills.
entries.JackTheGit/hermes-autonomous-server: A production-ready headless deployment that configures the Hermes Gateway as a reboot-safe systemd service on Ubuntu and Debian. It is designed for autonomous execution of recurring AI cron jobs and integrates with Nous Portal.
entries.jpalmae/hermeshq: A Docker-first control plane that allows users to operate multiple Hermes Agent instances with separate identities from a single web application. It features hierarchy-aware task scheduling and enterprise MCP access for external AI clients.
entries.ellickjohnson/portainer-stack-hermes: A Docker Compose stack designed for Portainer deployment that includes a ttyd web terminal for remote access. It utilizes GitHub Actions for automated image builds and is managed as a Portainer Git Repository stack.

entries.builderz-labs/mission-control: A self-hosted orchestration stack that uses a zero-dependency SQLite backend to dispatch tasks and monitor spend. It provides multi-gateway support for frameworks like CrewAI and LangGraph, featuring an Aegis review system for quality control.
entries.agent-of-empires/agent-of-empires: This project offers a TUI and PWA dashboard to monitor diverse coding agents, including Hermes and Claude Code, within isolated sandboxes. It enables parallel execution by leveraging git worktrees and multi-repo workspaces.
entries.CryptoDmitry/hermes-agent-control-room: A tiered architecture template designed to scale from a single VPS agent to full specialist teams. It utilizes a task bus pattern for delegation and includes bundled skills for security auditing and registry management.
entries.shannhk/hermes-agent-control-room: This control-room template uses a level-based architecture to transition from individual agents to automated, orchestrated workflows. It features a task bus for specialist handoffs and includes skills for VPS provisioning and backup management.
entries.swarmclawai/swarmclaw: An orchestration platform for building autonomous swarms that supports over 23 LLM providers, including Ollama and OpenRouter. It provides visual org charts, durable agent memory, and support for scheduled runs.
entries.Agent-3-7/minions: A centralized mission control interface that uses a Kanban board to track autonomous task statuses and review queues. It allows users to live-stream agent reasoning and perform human-in-the-loop verification on all completed tasks.
entries.linke-ai/hermes-agent-team: A local collaboration system that orchestrates Leader and Specialist agents through a real-time Web UI. It integrates MCP and ACP protocols to manage tool handling and agent dialogue flows via a Kanban interface.
entries.1ilkhamov/opencode-hermes-multiagent: A specialized pipeline for end-to-end software development featuring 17 distinct agents for roles like research, implementation, and infrastructure. The system enforces mandatory quality gates through dedicated reviewer and tester agents.
entries.howdymary/hermes-agent-metaharness: A meta-optimization tool that uses automated outer-loop search to refine Hermes Agent harness code. It orchestrates TBLite and TB2 benchmark evaluations to track performance frontiers through structured candidate mutation.
entries.runtimenoteslabs/gladiator: An agent-vs-agent arena where autonomous AI companies compete for GitHub stars. The platform orchestrates nine agents, including Hermes, and provides a real-time dashboard to visualize tasks and scoreboard metrics.
entries.Rainhoole/hermes-agent-acp-skill: A delegation tool that routes tasks between Hermes subagents, Codex, and Claude Code using ACP-style workflows. It prevents parent context pollution through isolation and enforces safety via configurable timeouts and character limits.

entries.colbymchenry/codegraph: This tool provides a local pre-indexed knowledge graph of symbol relationships and call graphs that auto-syncs on file changes. It optimizes Hermes Agent's performance by significantly reducing the number of tool calls and tokens required for code navigation.
entries.junhoyeo/tokscale: A high-performance Rust-based TUI designed to aggregate and track token costs across multiple AI clients. It allows developers to monitor spending and usage metrics for Hermes, Gemini, and Claude in a single interface.
entries.liaohch3/claude-tap: This local trace viewer enables deep inspection of API traffic, including system prompts and tool schemas. It features structured diffs for comparing requests and allows users to export sessions as portable HTML files for analysis.
entries.Salomondiei08/oh-my-hermes: An opinionated workflow layer that orchestrates autonomous CTO loops for issue triage and deployment. It extends Hermes Agent with 23 specialized skills and native integrations for Vercel, Supabase, and Sentry.
entries.joeynyc/hermes-skins: A collection of community-driven CLI themes that customize the Hermes terminal UI with ASCII art and unique color schemes. It supports partial configurations via inheritance, allowing users to mix default settings with aesthetics ranging from retro DOS to cyberpunk.
entries.AlexAI-MCP/hermes-CCC: A port of the Hermes Agent brain and its 46 core skills directly into the Claude Code Channel. It eliminates the need for OAuth or external processes while adding specialized MLOps tools for RL training and vLLM inference.
entries.unmodeled-tyler/vessel-browser: An AI-native browser that grants autonomous agents control via MCP while maintaining a human-visible UI for real-time supervision. It features durable state management with action undo and agent-specific bookmarks.
entries.Abruptive/Ankh.md: A TAW Agent framework that enables the creation of scoped Hermes Agents with per-folder configurations. It allows developers to seamlessly switch between global and project-local memories, tools, and instructions.
entries.adityahimaone/hermes-agent-rtk-caveman: This setup utilizes RTK and Caveman templating to achieve 90-99% token savings through optimized CLI workflows. It comes with 40+ pre-configured skills for research, finance, and devops with automated installation for macOS and Linux.
entries.42-evey/evey-setup: A rapid deployment stack that uses Docker to launch Hermes Agent with LiteLLM, Ollama, and Qdrant. It provides a zero-cost environment featuring 29 community plugins for memory and quality validation using local GPU inference.
entries.roli-lpci/lintlang: A deterministic static linter that scans agent configs and system prompts for failure modes using HERM v1.1 scoring. It integrates into CI/CD pipelines to provide fast, free scanning without requiring any LLM calls.
entries.0xNyk/openclaw-to-hermes: A dedicated migration utility that transfers personas, memories, and skills from OpenClaw to Hermes Agent. It maps complex model configurations to Hermes YAML format and handles the transfer of system-level credentials.

entries.farion1231/cc-switch: A cross-platform manager built with Tauri 2 that provides a unified interface for Hermes Agent, Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and other agent CLIs. It simplifies the management of multiple AI tools across Windows, macOS, and Linux.
entries.iOfficeAI/AionUi: A local cowork application that integrates various agent CLIs into a single interface. It features a built-in agent with MCP tool support and the ability to automatically generate editable .docx, .xlsx, and .pptx files.
entries.nesquena/hermes-webui: A lightweight web interface built with Python and vanilla JS that offers full parity with the Hermes CLI. It features a three-panel layout and an integrated workspace file browser with inline previews for mobile and web use.
entries.fathah/hermes-desktop: A desktop companion app designed to guide users through the installation and configuration of Hermes Agent. It supports multiple AI providers, local OpenAI-compatible endpoints, and integrates with 14 toolsets and 16 messaging gateways.
entries.EKKOLearnAI/hermes-web-ui: A comprehensive web dashboard focused on session management and multi-platform configuration for services like Telegram, Discord, and Slack. It utilizes SQLite for local session storage and provides detailed usage analytics and multi-profile control.
entries.outsourc-e/hermes-workspace: A native web workspace featuring a Monaco-powered file browser and a PTY terminal. It introduces Swarm Mode for role-based dispatch via tmux-backed workers and includes a dedicated MCP catalog and skills manager.
entries.dodo-reach/hermes-desktop: A native macOS workspace that provides direct SSH connections to Hermes without requiring browser wrappers or daemons. It includes dedicated views for Kanban, cron jobs, and session data for a professional developer experience.
entries.xaspx/hermes-control-interface: A self-hosted web dashboard featuring the ZOO Swarm Monitor for tracking agent health and a Kanban pipeline. It provides a full MCP server control plane with log tailing, a config editor, and real-time streaming chat.
entries.jazzyalex/agent-sessions: A native macOS session browser and 'agent cockpit' that indexes data from Hermes, Claude, and Cursor locally. It emphasizes privacy with no telemetry and includes a Limits Widget to predict usage for Codex and Claude.
entries.nickvasilescu/hermes-desktop-os1: A macOS interface specifically designed for Hermes Agent instances running on Orgo cloud VMs and SSH hosts. It enables one-click automated installation on cloud computers and integrates WebRTC voice mode via OpenAI Realtime.
entries.Eynzof/hermes-agent-cn-desktop: A Windows-first desktop application built with Tauri, TypeScript, and Rust, tailored for the Chinese market. It includes a built-in kernel manager for health checks and updates, with support for LaTeX and Mermaid rendering.
entries.liftaris/herm: An alternative TUI and dashboard built with OpenTUI that brings Hermes to the terminal. It features Kanban boards for diagnosing agentic work and TUI-based management of memory, toolsets, and profiles.
entries.clawvader-tech/hermes-telegram-miniapp: A mobile-first React SPA designed as a Telegram Mini App v2.0. It allows users to manage background agent spawning, scheduled cron jobs, and monitor system health via CPU and memory gauges from their phone.
entries.aivrar/portable-hermes-agent: A zero-install Windows desktop GUI that requires no admin rights or Docker. It comes pre-loaded with over 100 tools, including ComfyUI and MusicGen, and includes a dynamic tool maker for creating custom API wrappers.
entries.pyrate-llama/hermes-ui: A self-hosted, glassmorphic web interface delivered as a single-file React 18 HTML application. It integrates a terminal and file browser with real-time monitoring for agent logs and cron jobs.
entries.sanchomuzax/hermes-webui: A process monitoring dashboard that provides a real-time activity feed via WebSockets. It allows users to inspect session histories using FTS5 search and view read-only versions of environment variables and config.yaml.
entries.Euraika-Labs/pan-ui: A chat-first self-hosted workspace featuring tool approval cards and real-time SSE streaming. It includes a marketplace for discovering MCP servers and skills, alongside isolated profile management for separate API keys and memory.
entries.Felix-Forever/hermes-agent-desktop: A multi-agent desktop client that orchestrates collaboration between 20 specialized AI agents. It features a visual Skill Store with over 50 one-click installations and a PM orchestrator to manage streaming chat responses.
